summary: Completed end-to-end testing of Nova Digital Agency website. Backend APIs 100% functional, contact form integration working, minor UI improvements needed for language toggle and team section visibility.

ui_bugs.issue: Hero title missing space: 'نبنيالمستقبل' should be 'نبني المستقبل'
Language toggle button not found with expected selectors
Team section not easily found with 'Team'/'الفريق' text selectors

passed_tests: Backend API /api/team returns Sumood Salameen data
Backend API /api/contact form submission with email notification
Frontend loads with correct dark theme (#21242D background)
WhatsApp floating button visible and functional
Hero section renders with Arabic title
Contact form fields (name, email, phone, message) working
Contact form submission successful with toast notification
Google Maps iframe embedded and visible
action_item_for_main_agent: Minor UI improvements: 1) Fix hero title spacing 'نبني المستقبل', 2) Ensure language toggle button has proper data-testid for testing, 3) Consider adding data-testid to team section for better testing
